raw_grok_prompt: Create one high-quality Soul ID image featuring the same adult woman at least 20 years old with a voluptuous extreme hourglass figure from the reference image. outdoors, natural sunlight. Exact reference pose: standing sideways, arms outstretched. Strong sexual body emphasis: massive round plump juicy ass taking center focus, deep side cleavage, tiny cinched waist, wide hips, thick thighs, dramatic S-curve posture, skin-tight fabric clinging tightly to her curves. Outfit: wearing pink tank top, pink pants. Natural daylight, realistic fabric cling, consistent body proportions and pose, vertical smartphone aesthetic.
